title: Verify discount offer appears after loss aversion exit gate
description: Test that if user proceeds past loss aversion message, the discount offer popup appears with backend-controlled pricing
preconditions: Cancel flow reaches loss aversion gate
Discount offer is enabled from backend

steps.description: 3. At loss aversion popup, click secondary action to proceed

expected_result: Discount offer popup appears showing discounted first month price with title from backend, 'Grab Offer' button with primary prominence
